{
  "concepts": [
    {"text": "Scrapy", "rationale": "named web crawling framework"},
    {"text": "Beautiful Soup", "rationale": "named Python parsing library"},
    {"text": "Selenium", "rationale": "named browser automation tool"},
    {"text": "Octoparse", "rationale": "named web scraping tool"},
    {"text": "ParseHub", "rationale": "named web scraping tool"},
    {"text": "Import.io", "rationale": "named web scraping tool"},
    {"text": "Diffbot", "rationale": "named AI-powered data extraction tool"},
    {"text": "Uipath", "rationale": "named robotic process automation tool"},
    {"text": "Phantom Buster", "rationale": "named web scraping tool"},
    {"text": "Email Extractor", "rationale": "named email extraction software"},
    {"text": "web crawling framework", "rationale": "type of tool described for Scrapy"},
    {"text": "web scraping tool", "rationale": "general category of the listed tools"},
    {"text": "AI-powered data extraction tool", "rationale": "description of Diffbot"},
    {"text": "robotic process automation tool", "rationale": "description of Uipath"},
    {"text": "Python library", "rationale": "type of software for Beautiful Soup"},
    {"text": "parse tree", "rationale": "data structure created by Beautiful Soup"},
    {"text": "page source code", "rationale": "HTML source used to extract data"},
    {"text": "web browsers", "rationale": "targets automated by Selenium"},
    {"text": "web scraping", "rationale": "activity performed by the tools"},
    {"text": "email extraction", "rationale": "specific scraping activity mentioned"},
    {"text": "email addresses", "rationale": "type of data being extracted"},
    {"text": "CSV", "rationale": "export format supported by Import.io"},
    {"text": "Excel", "rationale": "export format mentioned for data"},
    {"text": "Google Sheets", "rationale": "export destination for scraped data"},
    {"text": "JSON", "rationale": "export format supported by Import.io"},
    {"text": "database", "rationale": "storage destination for exported data"},
    {"text": "websites", "rationale": "sources from which data is scraped"},
    {"text": "terms of service", "rationale": "legal constraint referenced"},
    {"text": "unsolicited communication", "rationale": "harmful use mentioned (spamming)"},
    {"text": "data protection laws", "rationale": "legal category to comply with"},
    {"text": "GDPR", "rationale": "named European data protection law"},
    {"text": "CCPA", "rationale": "named California data protection law"},
    {"text": "Europe", "rationale": "region associated with GDPR"},
    {"text": "California", "rationale": "jurisdiction associated with CCPA"},
    {"text": "HTML", "rationale": "markup language parsed by tools"},
    {"text": "XML", "rationale": "markup language parsed by tools"},
    {"text": "data scraping", "rationale": "feature referenced for RPA tools"},
    {"text": "web recording", "rationale": "feature referenced for Uipath"}
  ]
}
